name: Shanyuan Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanyuan Co., Ltd. engages in the construction of residential buildings in Taiwan. It also engages in the rental of office buildings and storefronts, and other properties. The company was formerly known as Fu Chan Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanyuan Co., Ltd. in January 2008. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
